confidence.description: Model confidence in the decision, in the unit interval.

diffClassification.description: How the evaluated diff was classified.

riskSignals.description: Risk signals the gate surfaced (free-form monikers).

suggestedJourneys.description: Journeys the gate suggests running, typed as `WorkflowRef` (INV-8).

fallbackReason.description: Why the gate fell back to a non-autonomous decision (present only on fallback).

promptId.description: The prompt that produced this decision.

modelId.description: The model that produced this decision.

_meta.description: Shared SMQ response metadata block (degraded seam + merge context).

nextActions.description: Ordered next actions for the consumer, as a verb-discriminated `NextAction` union.

description:
S1 semantic-merge-queue **MergeGateDecision** response envelope (#63).

The decision the CI coordinator (Exarchos) receives from the semantic judge
(Basileus AgentHost). It composes the SMQ `_meta` (`MergeQueueMetaV1`, degraded
seam + merge context) and `_perf` (telemetry) blocks, classifies the diff,
types its suggested journeys as `WorkflowRef`, and carries the verb-discriminated
`next_actions` list.

When `_meta.degraded` is true the decision is advisory: consumers short-circuit
"use the decision" logic (the observability seam — see `ResponseMetaV1`).
